array.string: export LARK_CLI_NO_PROXY=1 && lark-cli event +subscribe --as bot --event-types im.message.receive_v1 --compact --quiet --force 2>/dev/null | while IFS= read -r line; do if [ -n "$line" ]; then curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:18944/forward -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "$line" > /dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; done
